components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-white px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-black hover:bg-neutral-200 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-black
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-white/20 bg-transparent px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
components.card: rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.02] p-8 transition-all hover:bg-white/[0.04]
components.terminal_window: rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] shadow-2xl w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto
components.terminal_header: flex items-center px-4 py-3 bg-[#171717] border-b border-white/10
components.nav_header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

hero_background.description: 3D translucent crystal structure. Use as an absolute positioned background in the hero section with low opacity (10-20%) and a radial gradient mask to fade it out towards the edges. This gives a premium tech feel.

sections_instructions.nav: Sticky glassmorphism header. Left: 'Crystal Guard' text in mono font with a subtle icon. Right: 'Documentation' link and 'GitHub' primary button.
sections_instructions.hero: Huge H1 'The Architecture Guardian for Vibe-Coded Projects'. Subtitle below it explaining the value prop. Center aligned. Below subtitle, a beautiful Terminal Window mockup showing a CLI command execution (e.g., 'crystal init' outputting 'Architecture gates activated.'). Background features the crystal image heavily faded out via opacity and radial gradients.
sections_instructions.problem: Heading: 'Vibe coding is fast. Until it breaks.' Bento grid (Mode A) of 3-4 cards highlighting common problems like 'Spaghetti Code', 'Broken Imports', and 'Hallucinated Dependencies'. Use stark typography.
sections_instructions.solution: Heading: 'Guardrails, not roadblocks.' 3 Pillars in a row: 'MCP Server' (IDE integration), 'CLI Tool' (local checks), 'CI/CD Gates' (pipeline enforcement). Use Lucide icons (e.g., Server, Terminal, ShieldCheck).
sections_instructions.quick_start: A prominent section with a large terminal block. Must include a 'Copy to clipboard' button. Show 'npm install -g crystal-guard' and 'crystal init'.
sections_instructions.use_cases: Grid of 2x2 or 3 columns showcasing supported frameworks (e.g., React Apps, Node/Python APIs, Next.js). Minimalist card style.
sections_instructions.commands_reference: Use a minimal Shadcn Table (customized with dark theme, transparent background, white/10 borders) listing commands (crystal check, crystal fix, crystal status) and their descriptions.
sections_instructions.footer: Large section with 'Ready to secure your vibes?' and a large primary button to GitHub. Simple links below. Padding top/bottom generous (py-32).

critical_rules: Strictly Dark Theme. Background must be #000000 or #0A0A0A.
No teal or purple. Allowed accent is Blue/White.
Do not use Inter for headings. Use Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for code.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='copy-command-btn').
Do not use generic 'card' component from Shadcn if it restricts layout, use raw HTML/Tailwind for bento grids.
Images must not be placeholder URLs. Only use the provided hero_background.
Terminal windows must look authentic (macOS dots: close, minimize, expand).
